disclaimer.title: Legal Disclaimer
disclaimer.intro: LegallySpoken provides general legal information and self-help tools. We are not a law firm and do not provide legal advice.
disclaimer.notAdvice: Information on this site is not a substitute for legal advice from a licensed attorney in your jurisdiction. Laws change frequently and vary by location.
disclaimer.noRelationship: Using this site does not create an attorney-client relationship.
disclaimer.consultLawyer: For advice on your specific situation, consult a qualified lawyer.

shortDisclaimer: Not legal advice. For your specific situation, consult a qualified lawyer.
